name: Hungarian Goulash Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds lean beef chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef chuck into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat the shortening or oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until tender. Stir in paprika and cook for one minute.
3. Remove the onions and garlic with a slotted spoon. Brown the beef cubes on all sides, several at a time, making sure they are dry.
4. Return the onions and garlic to the pot. Add tomatoes, caraway seeds, marjoram, lemon peel, water, salt, and pepper.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce the heat to low and cover the pot. Cook for 45 minutes.
6. Stir in the potatoes and continue cooking until they are tender, about 20 more minutes.
7. Serve hot.
